---
title: The Role of Planetary Waves in the Downward Influence of Stratospheric Final
  Warming Events
pagetitle: 2011-12-1-Sun2011 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2011
author: Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2826--2843, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-014.1.
recommended_citation: 'Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen, 2011: The Role
  of Planetary Waves in the Downward Influence of Stratospheric Final Warming Events,
  <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2826--2843, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-014.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-014.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# The Role of Planetary Waves in the Downward Influence of Stratospheric Final Warming Events

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2011*

**Recommended citation:** Lantao Sun, Walter A. Robinson and Gang Chen, 2011: The Role of Planetary Waves in the Downward Influence of Stratospheric Final Warming Events, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 68, 2826--2843, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-014.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-014.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
